case_title: ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE VS. JOHN ROSS et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT #515, SF, TOGETHER W/ALL ATTNDANT PRKNG, STORAGE & COMMON AREAS $1,520.34 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.34, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION" (AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS)
ORDER THAT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BE ENTERED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR UD JUDGMENT & FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PER STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, JOHN DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE , $18.93 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON
